title: EL TOMADOR
description: New York detectives duo cannot make sense of what has happened

sentences.text: En un tiempo y espacio diferentes...
sentences.translation: In a different time and space...

sentences.text: No te estás comiendo la comida.
sentences.translation: You are not eating your food

sentences.text: Mmmm... Sabes que no me gusta eso...
sentences.translation: Mmmm... You know that I don't like that...

words.meaning: a sound expressing thought or hesitation

sentences.translation: Can I get you anything else Sir? Madam?

sentences.text: ...y apuesto a que sé qué la mató...
sentences.translation: ...and I bet I know what killed her...

sentences.text: Ella lo tiene, como los demás.
sentences.translation: She has it, like the others...
They are all player... All six.

sentences.text: Sí... te lo estoy diciendo... Todo es del juego...
sentences.translation: Yes... I'm telling you... It's all from the game...
We need to look at the game...

sentences.text: Trabaja para nosotros... para la policía.
sentences.translation: He works for us... for the police.

sentences.text: Sí. Trabaja en ciberseguridad. Pero también es gamer.
sentences.translation: Yes. He's in cyber security. But he's also a gamer.

sentences.text: Ustedes dos no se han conocido, ¿verdad?
Detective Ruiz, esta es Elena Vega. Elena, conoce al detective Ruiz.
sentences.translation: Detective Ruiz, this is Elena Vega. Elena - meet Detective Ruiz.

sentences.text: ¿El detective Ruiz tiene nombre de pila?
sentences.translation: Does Detective Ruiz have a first name?

sentences.text: Sí tengo uno... Es Fernando... Es un placer conocerte.
sentences.translation: I do have one... It's Fernando... It's a pleasure to meet you.
So, Fernando. How can I help?

sentences.text: No. Están muriendo... en el mundo real...
sentences.translation: No. The are dying... in the real world...
Oh? So how did they die?

sentences.text: Eso es lo que estamos tratando de averiguar.
sentences.translation: That is what we are trying to find out...

sentences.text: Creemos que de alguna manera está matando desde el juego.
sentences.translation: We think he's killing from the game somehow.

sentences.text: quizá alguien encontró una forma de matar jugadores desde dentro del juego...
sentences.translation: maybe someone found a way to kill players from inside the game...

sentences.text: Sí. Va en serio. Seis hasta ahora...
sentences.translation: Yes. He's serious. Six so far.
We know... that it sounds crazy...
Would you please think about it?
What do I get out of it?
